channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: You can try DeepSeek’s R1 through Perplexity—without the security risk
item.description: The AI search firm Perplexity routinely lets users try out state-of-the-art large language models (LLMs) on its site, but the company moved quickly to put Chinese company DeepSeek’s new R1 model front and center in its user interface.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: The value of Trump’s memecoin has dropped more than 75% since inauguration
item.description: Donald Trump drew plenty of criticism by launching his own branded memecoin three days before his inauguration, including from the crypto community which argued he was making a mockery of the crypto world by tying himself to the memecoin world, which could damage efforts to make crypto reforms.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Fast fashion, laptops and toys are likely to cost more due to US tariffs on Chinese imports
item.description: A sweeping new U.S. tariff on products made in China is expected to increase the prices American consumers pay for a wide array of products, from the ultra-cheap apparel sold on online shopping platforms to toys and electronic devices such as computers and cellphones.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Goodbye digital transformation, hello AI-first business transformation
item.description: Perhaps we got digital transformation wrong this whole time. Instead of focusing on the transformation part, we did a lot less transforming and a lot more digitalization.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Judge says Elon Musk's claims of harm from OpenAI are a 'stretch' but welcomes possible trial
item.description: OAKLAND, Calif. (AP) — Elon Musk's lawyers faced off with OpenAI in court Tuesday as a federal judge weighed the billionaire's request for a court order that would block the ChatGPT maker from converting itself to a for-profit company. U.S.
item.dc:creator: BARBARA ORTUTAY and MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Google's rising holiday's season ad sales aren't enough to ease worries about AI letdown
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google's digital ad sales continued to grow at a healthy clip during the holiday season, but that wasn't enough to offset investors' worries about whether its big bet on artificial intelligence will be lucrative as once envisioned.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Tech layoffs this year: A timeline
item.description: 2025 began in turmoil, with layoffs at some of the largest tech companies despite the support shown by the new US administration. 2024 had been a year of recovery, with the pace of layoffs slowing and IT employment the highest for years following two years of massive IT layoff in 2022 and 2023.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Apple lashes out at iPhone porn app maker and the EU rules allowing its download
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple has chided a newly available pornography app available in the European Union, and warned that the bloc’s digital rules opening the way for third-party app store downloads undermines consumer confidence in the tech giant.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Anthropic has a new security system it says can stop almost all AI jailbreaks
item.description: AI giant’s latest attempt at safeguarding against abusive prompts is mostly successful, but, by its own admission, still needs work.
item.dc:creator: luke.hughes@futurenet.com (Luke Hughes), TechRadar

item.title: How an ancient asteroid strike carved out 2 grand canyons on the moon
item.description: New research shows that when an asteroid slammed into the moon billions of years ago, it carved out a pair of grand canyons on the far side.
item.dc:creator: Marcia Dunn, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Reports: NorthBay Health data breach affected more than 500,000 patients
item.description: The healthcare system was forced to turn patients away and cancel appointments for a short time following the attack.
item.dc:creator: Robin Miller, The Mercury News

item.title: The iPhone’s first official porn app has just landed in the EU – and Apple really isn’t happy about it
item.description: Apple says it's "deeply concerned about the safety risks" of a new porn app called Hot Tub that's just arrived on a third-party app store in the EU.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: As EV vehicles get heavier, they’re also getting more dangerous, safety experts say
item.description: the proliferation of heavier electric trucks in recent years has raised concerns among safety experts who fear their increased speed and weight will lead to deadlier incidents
item.dc:creator: Chase Hunter, The Mercury News

item.title: The Fantastic Four: First Steps trailer has lift-off as Marvel finally reveals the MCU movie's unique visuals, charming cast, and high-stakes plot
item.description: Marvel has officially debuted the first trailer for The Fantastic Four's first, long overdue MCU adventure.
item.dc:creator: tom.power@futurenet.com (Tom Power), TechRadar

item.title: Google makes its appeal to overturn jury verdict branding the Play Store as illegal monopoly
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Google went to appeals court Monday in an attempt to convince a three-judge panel to overturn a jury's verdict declaring its app store for Android smartphones as an illegal monopoly and block the penalties imposed by a federal judge to stop the misbehavior.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: China unveils the world’s fastest high-speed train with a top speed of 280 mph
item.description: China recently unveiled a new bullet train prototype with a test speed of 280 mph that is poised to break records and set new standards.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: This free music-streaming site can replace your Spotify subscription
item.description: You know what I miss? Listening to the radio. I’ve always loved background music, which helps me focus. But modern music-streaming services can be distracting. Yes, I enjoy having instant access to millions of songs with services like Spotify.
item.dc:creator: Chris Hoffman, Fast Company

item.title: TLS 1.3: A Major Upgrade in Security, Performance, and Privacy
item.description: TLS 1.3 is a significant upgrade over its predecessor, offering improved security, performance, and privacy.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Quantum Computing Hype: A Sobering Reality for Enterprises
item.description: As enterprises invest heavily in quantum computing initiatives, a growing pattern of disappointment and wasted resources emerges. It's time to re-evaluate the value proposition of QaaS.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft reports 10% quarterly profit growth as it works to show AI investments paying off
item.description: Microsoft said Wednesday that its profit for the October-December quarter grew 10% as it works to capitalize on the huge amounts of money it has spent to advance its artificial intelligence technology.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, NewsNation
